response.overview: The distant future. People have learned how to make living planets for different purposes. For example, the brain planet is a universal supercomputer. However, the moon park planet went crazy and kidnapped its adjuster. Now the universal computer suggests sending a crew of the Cosmodourney Galaxy to search. As a result of the time paradox, the team members become children again, which partly helps them in saving people.
response.title: Безумная планета
